channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Notes is shutting down as Lemon8 steps in
item.description: TikTok is shutting down TikTok Notes—wait, you didn’t even know it existed? Well, that explains a lot. TikTok Notes, the platform’s short-lived attempt to take on Instagram (just as Instagram Reels was built to mimic TikTok), is officially being retired.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Brown University to see half a billion in federal funding halted by Trump administration
item.description: A White House official says the Trump administration is planning to halt more than half a billion dollars in contracts and grants awarded to Brown University.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne Mumphrey And Seung Min Kim, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ServiceNow to acquire Logik.ai to boost CRM portfolio
item.description: ServiceNow is acquiring Logik.ai and its configure, price, quote (CPQ) solution to expand its customer relationship management (CRM) product portfolio and accelerate its momentum in sales and order management. Logik.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Visa unveils a trio of new tools to make the payments process easier
item.description: At Visa’s ETA Transact event on April 3, the payments giant introduced three new products designed to simplify and secure payment acceptance. These innovations—Authorize.
item.dc:creator: Lily McDonald, Fast Company

item.title: Mainframe Modernization Gets a Boost from Generative AI - IBM's Big Iron Refresh and Startup Mechanical Orchard Unveil Imogen Service
item.description: Mainframe modernization gets a boost from generative AI as IBM prepares its next mainframe refresh, and startup Mechanical Orchard unveils its Imogen service to help customers move legacy workloads into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hyperlight Wasm points to the future of serverless
item.description: Back when I first wrote about Hyperlight, Microsoft’s minimal hypervisor, I speculated that it had a possible role as a WebAssembly-based alternative to serverless computing tools like Azure Functions, using Kubernetes as a host.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Siemens grows its digital twin strategy into life sciences market
item.description: Siemens has agreed to acquire Dotmatics, the developer of a data platform for scientific research, taking it into the life sciences market.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Magid: Microsoft Turns 50
item.description: Fifty years ago, on April 4, 1975, Bill Gates and the late Paul Allen founded Microsoft. A half century later, it’s one of the world’s most valuable companies. And even though it’s based in Redmond, Washinton, it has a strong Silicon Valley presence.
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge blocks social media age-verification law in Arkansas
item.description: A federal judge in Arkansas permanently blocked a law requiring age verification for social media accounts, deeming it unconstitutional. The law was stopped by U.S. District Judge Timothy L. Brooks of the Western District of Arkansas.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: GenAI is already transforming the healthcare industry
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is quickly transforming healthcare, according to a survey by consultancy McKinsey & Co. released today. The survey of 150 healthcare industry organizations found 85% are exploring or had already adopted genAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Python Web Framework Python Unveils Latest Update with Enhanced Features
item.description: The latest version of the Python web framework Django has been unveiled by the Django Software Foundation, featuring an automatic model-importing capability and more.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Plug and Play AI startup incubator launches downtown San Jose tech hub
item.description: A new artificial intelligence center of excellence has officially launched in downtown San Jose and picked its first location.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Leadership, trust and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare
item.description: As the military navigates the complexities of the 21st-century battlefield, the integration of artificial intelligence is a leadership imperative. The post Leadership, trust and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Google's new AI may know when your house is on fire
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google adds end-to-end email encryption to Gmail
item.description: Google has introduced a new end-to-end encryption (E2EE) feature in Gmail, enabling organizations to send encrypted emails that even Google cannot read to other Gmail users.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: DISA’s Jeff Marshall on aligning tech to solving warfighter problems
item.description: DISA pursues a two-pronged customer experience strategy to ensure its IT services meet warfighters’ needs, the director of J9 Hosting and Compute says.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5
